scripts.build:web: rm -rf web/dist && bun build web/js/main.js --outdir web/dist --target browser --format esm --splitting --public-path /web/dist/ --entry-naming '[name].js' --chunk-naming '[name]-[hash].js' --production --minify
scripts.dev:web: bun build web/js/main.js --outdir web/dist --target browser --format esm --splitting --public-path /web/dist/ --entry-naming '[name].js' --chunk-naming '[name]-[hash].js' --watch
